title: Fetzi's Displays
description: Ever wanted to display your Items in a more special way? Now you can!
body:
![Mod Banner](https://i.imgur.com/97E07Wx.png)
### **🌟 Content** ### Fetzi's Displays adds new ways to display your hard earned items! * Glass Cloches in all 16 colors * Katana Stands to display your weapons like a trophy * Wall Holders with Plaques to display your very cool name you gave your Item (and also lame name like GOD SWORD or smth. like this...) * Racks! 4 different types of Racks that all slightly display the items in a different way. * Items to manipulate the scale, rotation and position of the displayed item! (I personally recommend to take a look into the [Wiki](https://fetzis-orga.gitbook.io/fetzis-displays) for more Info!) * Active development so decide what comes next! ![line](https://i.imgur.com/3xkCLnL.png) ### **📷 Gallery** ### New Crafting Method! Craft your new Displays with the new Workbench Block! **![](https://i.imgur.com/qk7gzPp.png)** ### **Racks, Wall Holders & Glass Cloches** Different ways to present your stuff in it's deserved way! ![](https://i.imgur.com/6oVWDEt.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/RjJZy3C.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/wXBAP9q.png) **![line](https://i.imgur.com/3xkCLnL.png)** ### **❓ F.A.Q.** #### **Can i use this mod in my modpack?** Sure, but it would be nice if you link the mod if you plan to use it in a public modpack 😊! #### **Are you planning to port this mod to other versions?** I will try to keep the mod alive and port it to every upcoming version of Minecraft starting with 1.20.1, but i have no plans to port it to older versions of Minecraft. #### **Will you continue adding new blocks or items to this mod?** I'll gladly accept any suggestion you have and will surely add it if it's a good idea 😊! For suggestions use the [Wiki](https://fetzis-orga.gitbook.io/fetzis-displays/) or [Discord](http://discord.gg/GSaW4rr5NB)! 😊 #### **What modloaders do you support?** It depends on the Minecraft Version: 1.20.1 - Forge. Fabric 1.21    - NeoForge, Fabric **Are you going to add more content?** Most likely yes! This is the first version and most likely not the last one to come! So if you have any suggestions, then join our Discord! After all, the mod lives from suggestions 😄. ![line](https://i.imgur.com/3xkCLnL.png) ### **💫 Recommendations** I recommend using [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) to view all crafting recipes directly ingame! Otherwise, you can find the crafting recipes in the linked [Wiki](https://fetzis-orga.gitbook.io/fetzis-displays/) or [Discord](http://discord.gg/GSaW4rr5NB)! ![line](https://i.imgur.com/3xkCLnL.png) ### **🔗 Check out my other mods**
![line](https://i.imgur.com/3xkCLnL.png) ### 💰 **Ways to support me** The best way to support me is to share this mod with your friends and people online 😊. But if you want to support me even more, you can also donate to me via Ko-Fi.Please donate money to me **only** if you don't need it yourself, you should never feel pressured to give your money to strangers from the internet, I'll be fine without it, trust me 😊.  [![](https://storage.ko-fi.com/cdn/brandasset/kofi_button_red.png)](https://ko-fi.com/notfetzi)
